positioning: Dentist building safe, human-in-the-loop AI workflow infrastructure for dental and healthcare-adjacent use cases.

synthetic_case_notice.description: Clear statement that the packet is fictional, synthetic-only, local-only, contains no PHI, and is not for clinical use.

packet_id.description: Synthetic packet identifier such as SYN-PACKET-001.

source_documents.description: Inventory of synthetic source labels, not real records.

imaging_metadata_inventory.description: Metadata labels only. No real imaging files and no image interpretation.

patient_reported_concerns.description: Fictional self-reported concerns for workflow organization only, not diagnosis.

external_plan_quotes.description: Synthetic excerpts or labels from externally provided materials, preserved as quotes without judging correctness.

travel_timing_constraints.description: Fictional travel or scheduling constraints to organize questions for a human reviewer.

cost_administrative_constraints.description: Fictional insurance, payment, receipt, or administrative questions. No price guarantee or affordability judgment.

missing_information.description: Items that are absent, unclear, stale, or require human follow-up.

questions_for_human_review.description: Questions to ask a qualified human reviewer or dentist, without diagnosis or treatment recommendation.

provenance_records.description: Links between packet fields and synthetic source labels.

safety_labels.description: Boundary flags for non-diagnostic, synthetic-first, human-reviewed workflow status.

review_status.description: Manual workflow status. Approval never means automatic patient-facing final messaging.
